Sourdough Bread, Croissants and Custom Cakes in Springfield

We are a family bakery in Springfield. We bake sourdough bread, croissants, and custom cakes every morning. Our doors have opened since 1998. Visit us Tuesday through Sunday, seven a.m. to seven p.m. You can also order online for same-day pickup at our downtown counter.

About us

Example Bakery — 1 Main St, Springfield — +1-555-0100
